category_sources: source_facts.description says it hides JavaScript inside valid image files; official GitHub README describes packaging JavaScript into image files and XSS-related use.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official GitHub README identify the project as imagejs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains build, usage, examples, and background documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official GitHub README describe a command-line tool for embedding JavaScript in image files with XSS/security context.
